M-064.NAME: user-cabinet-auth-mtproto-ux-polish
M-064.owns: Registration password example UX, owner MTProto dual-link behavior, Russian MTProto field labels, and dynamic dashboard status badge refresh.
M-064.purpose: Polish the user cabinet and registration UX without changing backend MTProto, auth, or deploy/install contracts.

exports.view-password-example: Registration form shows a safe example of password format matching the active policy without encouraging literal reuse.
exports.fn-build-mtproto-app-link: Builds tg://proxy owner link from server, port, and secret for Telegram app opening.
exports.fn-build-mtproto-browser-link: Builds https://t.me/proxy owner link from server, port, and secret for browser/copy workflows.
exports.view-mtproto-russian-labels: MTProto card labels visible user-facing fields as Ссылка, Сервер, Порт, and Секрет.
exports.view-dynamic-status-badge: MTProto status badge refreshes from current owner proxy state instead of staying stale.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not change backend MTProto issuance, secrets, provisioning, runtime, deploy/install, Docker, nginx, or database schema.
constraints.constraint-2: Owner MTProto secret and full links remain visible only inside the authenticated owner dashboard.
constraints.constraint-3: Telegram app link must use tg://proxy; browser/share link must use https://t.me/proxy.
constraints.constraint-4: Status refresh interval must be bounded to avoid unnecessary backend load.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Registration UI shows a password example that satisfies the active frontend/backend policy and is clearly not a recommended literal password.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Telegram button opens tg://proxy and Ссылка copies or exposes https://t.me/proxy.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Visible MTProto card labels are localized as Ссылка, Сервер, Порт, and Секрет.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Activated/degraded/pending MTProto status badge can refresh dynamically from the API state.
acceptance-metrics.metric-5: Frontend build, Phase-46 smoke, MyGRACE lint, XML parse, and deploy/install diff guard pass.

M-064.hotspot: H-051: User cabinet UX polish must separate tg app links from browser links, keep MTProto secrets owner-only, and avoid stale status badges
